filter: severity in {Critical, High} OR severity_estimated in {Critical, High}
purpose: Stage-2 improve-loop teaching material (speca#88/#143): concrete critical/high failure classes across the EL+CL surface. The vendored data/ethereum_vulns.csv is a 37-row consensus slice with only 3 critical/high rows, too thin to drive concreteness; this slice widens the critical/high signal.
note: Improve reads only class fields (severity/label/root_cause); title/attack_path are carried for traceability but never enter the improve prompt (speca#143 safeguard fix).
